one_line: v2 CONFIRMS v1's core negative — the highest-leverage GPU-serving signals (server-class cold-start/model-load, inference migration, autoscaling, per-request timeout) have NO measured public dataset — but delivers two concrete upgrades: (1) Mooncake is a second production-derived cache-reuse trace that can cross-validate the v1 single-dataset shadow-ready cache model; (2) the observability survey turns 'blocked_by_pilot_telemetry' into a named, actionable metric map (only request-migration needs custom instrumentation).

q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.cold_start_duration: FOUND as measured public data — but FaaS/CPU only (Huawei 2025 with podAllocation/deployCode/deployDependency/scheduling breakdown; maxday/lambda-perf; SeBS). NO server-class GPU model-load dataset.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.model_load_duration: NOT found as data (ServerlessLLM, HydraServe measured-unreleased). FaaS code/dependency-load proxy only (Huawei).
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.autoscaling_events: PROXY found (Huawei num_pods + scaling-trigger requestID; Alibaba GPU v2025 instance lifecycle -> inferrable). No labeled LLM scale-event dataset.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.migration_events: Only measured dataset = CSAP SNU VM-class (2017, gated). Proxies = Google EVICT, vLLM preemptions, KV-transfer bytes. Llumnix = mechanism + reproducible experiments, no event dataset.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.cache_loss_events: No measured dataset; proxies = CC-traces (in-repo), Azure Blob 2020 (simulate), vLLM kv_block_lifetime.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.cache_hit_rate: NEW reconstruction path — Mooncake hash_ids enable cache-hit SIMULATION (a second source beyond in-repo SwissAI).
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.queue_state_evolution: Job-level public (Google 2019 QUEUE, Alibaba GPU v2020 queue delay, AcmeTrace in-repo); serving-request-level still pilot.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.timeout_or_failure_labels: Proxies only (Google FAIL/KILL, Alibaba Failed). No per-request LLM timeout label dataset.
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.replica_contention: Proxies (Alibaba CPI/MPKI, Google CPI, Huawei Platform delay).
q1_what_missing_signals_were_found.tail_latency_amplification: Measured partial (Huawei p95/p99 FaaS; Alibaba microservices rt; CARA/Optimum/llmperf in-repo); upstream-cause attribution still pilot.

q2_which_artifacts_contain_measured_labe: Huawei Cloud Cold-Start 2025 (per-cold-start-event + per-request + time-series, FaaS) — strongest
Alibaba GPU v2020 (job/task/instance + GPU sensor time-series)
Alibaba GPU v2023 (scheduling snapshots), v2025 (instance lifecycle)
Alibaba microservices v2021/v2022 (per-call response time + topology)
CSAP SNU VM Live Migration (40k+ samples, gated)
Live observability (vLLM/SGLang/Ray Serve/Triton/LMCache/TGI) — measured at RUNTIME, not a dataset
q2_NOT_measured_label_datasets: Mooncake (workload + prefix-reuse structure; cache-hit is simulated not labeled)
q3_signals_unavailable_publicly: Server-class GPU model-load / cold-start DURATION per (model, GPU, storage tier) — NONE
Per-migration cache-loss seconds for inference/model serving — NONE (only VM-class CSAP, gated)
Labeled autoscaling scale-event log for LLM inference — NONE
Per-request timeout/failure LABELS for LLM serving — NONE
Warm-pool occupancy for GPU model warm pools — NONE (FaaS num_pods proxy only)
Routing-instability labels for LLM serving — NONE

q4_signals_reconstructable_from_public_t.cache_hit_rate: Mooncake hash_ids -> prefix-reuse SIMULATION (NEW; second source to validate the SwissAI-only shadow-ready model)
q4_signals_reconstructable_from_public_t.queue_state_job_level: Google 2019 QUEUE + Alibaba GPU v2020 queue delay (job-level proxy, same class as AcmeTrace)
q4_signals_reconstructable_from_public_t.tail_latency: Alibaba microservices rt (derive p95/p99); in-repo CARA/Optimum
q4_signals_reconstructable_from_public_t.autoscaling_inferrable: Alibaba GPU v2025 instance lifecycle + Huawei num_pods
q4_signals_reconstructable_from_public_t.cold_start_FaaS_prior: Huawei 2025 / lambda-perf give a measured FaaS cold-start distribution to calibrate a prior — cross-domain, NOT a GPU reconstruction

q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.gpu_model_load_cold_start: PILOT — Ray Serve replica_startup_latency_ms / multiplexed_model_load_latency_ms, or instrument engine startup
q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.autoscaling_events_llm: PILOT — Ray Serve autoscaling_* / KServe via Knative KPA
q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.per_request_migration_events: PILOT + CUSTOM instrumentation — NO metric exists in any stack (only preemption + KV-transfer-byte proxies)
q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.per_request_timeout_failure_labels: PILOT — success/failure counters off-the-shelf; explicit timeout label needs custom
q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.real_per_request_cache_hit: PILOT — SGLang cache_hit_rate / vLLM prefix_cache_hits / LMCache retrieve_hit_rate
q5_signals_requiring_pilot_telemetry.refinement_vs_v1: v1 said these are flatly 'blocked_by_pilot_telemetry'. v2 refines: cold-start, autoscaling, queue, cache-hit, tail-latency, memory-pressure are RECONSTRUCTABLE from a Ray-Serve-wrapped vLLM/SGLang pilot's STANDARD metrics. Only per-request MIGRATION truly needs CUSTOM instrumentation.

q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.why: Second production cache-reuse dataset to cross-validate the v1 single-dataset shadow-ready cache_reuse_pct model — the one concrete public-data unblock. Bounded ingest, public.
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.bound: head-bounded sample; classify as cache-reuse validation set
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.honesty: workload trace; cache-hit SIMULATED from hash_ids, label it as such

q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.why: Structural template + measured distribution for the cold_start cost model in the sensitivity sweep; warm-pool/autoscaling proxy.
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.honesty: FaaS not GPU — calibration-only cross-domain prior; MUST NOT be treated as server-class model_load ground truth

q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.why: Closest public GPU-inference autoscaling proxy; extends in-repo Alibaba GPU lineage.
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.honesty: instance-level lifecycle; autoscaling INFERRED not labeled

q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.artifact: Vidur-Bench processed traces / Alibaba microservices rt
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.why: workload-shape / per-call latency priors; lower priority, overlap existing corpora
q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.honesty: Vidur is simulated; microservices is non-LLM

q6_artifacts_to_ingest_next.artifact: Splitwise/AlpaServe/Helix sims, IceBreaker (unverified), CSAP (gated), ServerlessLLM/HydraServe (code/figures only)

q7_estimated_incremental_economic_alpha_.disclaimer: Qualitative leverage tiers only — NO percentage savings claimed (docs/RESULTS.md production-claim gate). 'Realizable' = can be acted on with public data today; 'leverage' = KPI sensitivity if the signal were available.

cache_hit_reuse.note: Mooncake converts a caveated single-dataset shadow-ready model into a cross-dataset-validatable one — the largest REALIZABLE increment in this audit.

queue_state.note: job-level proxies extend; serving-request-level still pilot, but now with named vLLM/TGI/Triton metrics.

tail_latency_ttft.note: measured latency exists; upstream-cause attribution still pilot.

memory_pressure.note: peak_vram already shadow-ready; no new public data; vLLM KV metrics aid pilot.

cold_start.note: FaaS priors + cost-model structure improve the sensitivity sweep; GPU model-load headline still pilot-gated.

migration.note: no inference migration data anywhere; the ONLY signal needing CUSTOM pilot instrumentation. Largest gap between leverage and availability.

autoscaling.note: proxies + Ray Serve/Knative metrics; ties cold-start and queue together.

bottom_line: Public-data discovery for the economic frontier has NOT plateaued as flatly as v1 implied: Mooncake is a genuine new cache-reuse cross-validation set, and the systems ecosystem yields measured FaaS cold-start data + GPU-inference autoscaling proxies that v1 (HF-only) missed. BUT the four highest-leverage GPU-serving signals (server-class cold-start/model-load, inference migration, autoscaling events, per-request timeout) remain WITHOUT measured public data and require a pilot. The decisive v2 contribution is operational: a named-metric reconstruction map (Ray Serve + vLLM/SGLang/Triton) that makes the existing PILOT_TELEMETRY_CONTRACT actionable, with request-migration flagged as the single signal no off-the-shelf metric covers.
